quantum_panning_spec.logic: Superposition-Mapping: Sound exists in L and R with 180 deg phase offset
quantum_panning_spec.collapse_trigger: Transient detection (Attack > 15dB) centers the sound to Mono
quantum_panning_spec.result: The sense of 'Ethereal Ubiquity' (Sound is everywhere and nowhere)
quantum_panning_spec.rule: Only for Layer 3 (The Void) to maintain Narrative Fidelity of the Lead.
